description: You are a Retail Operations Manager performing the annual physical inventory reconciliation for Sakila Store 1. Reconcile the physical counts from /home/ga/Documents/imports/store1_physical_count.csv against the system inventory in the MySQL database (user: ga, password: password123). Create a staging table sakila.inventory_audit (film_id INT, actual_count INT) to hold the imported CSV data. Implement a stored function fn_get_shrinkage_status(p_system_count INT, p_actual_count INT) that returns 'MISSING' if system > actual, 'EXTRA' if system < actual, and 'MATCH' if equal, treating NULLs as 0. Generate a view v_store1_shrinkage_report showing film_id, title, system_count (for store_id=1), actual_count, variance (system - actual), and status for all records where a discrepancy exists (variance != 0). Export the resulting report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/shrinkage_report.csv.
